dialogos.texto_en: Uwaa! Wh-what?!
O-okay, I'm opening it now!
Oh, it's Itsuki-chan.\nWelcome back%p-2;――
Ichikaaa...
Wh-what happened?!
I-I'm a failure as a girlfriend!
Huh...
Itsuki-chan, let's go inside first, shall we?\nThen I'll carefully listen to your story, okay?
%p-2;――%p; And then, well, I came back alone.
I-I see...
I understand the situation now.
I have a lot to say, though.
Yeah, Futaro-kun needs to be scolded\nfor approaching Itsuki-chan in a way\nto make her cry like that.
P-please don't do that! It was my fault!
You, Itsuki? Why?
That's because...\nI, as Uesugi-kun's 'girlfriend,'\ncouldn't accept him...
Huh? Really?
I mean, isn't it?!
If I'm his 'girlfriend,'\nI should have been happy to accept him, right?!\nI couldn't even do that!
So, when I refused Uesugi-kun on the spot,\nI thought, maybe, that...
That...
I might, not like him.
HUH?
WHAT are you going on about now?
After the school festival,\nyou were really struggling with your answer.\nAre you saying, it was wrong?
That's...
It's not wrong!\nI can tell just by looking\nthat you really love Uesugi-san, Itsuki!
...Is that really true though?
Listen up, you%p-2;――
Nino, wait.
Itsuki.\nWhy did you decide to date Futaro?
Huh...
Nino, Ichika, Yotsuba and I have all said a lot.\nBut, Itsuki, you were the one who decided \nand we never heard the reason.
Well, I do kind of understand the reason.
Please tell us properly.\nRight here, right now.
...I understand.
I have learned many things from meeting Uesugi-kun\nand being taught by him.
Thanks to him, I have grown a lot and found my dream,\nand I was able to come this far.
So, even before he confessed to me%p-2;――
Uesugi-kun had already become an important friend\nwhom I could respect\nfrom the bottom of my heart.
Sure, that's what you say, right?
Amidst all that, he...\nconfessed his feelings to me...
At first, I didn't understand.\nBut, I felt the same way too.
I wanted to be by his side, forever...\nas someone more special to him than anyone else.\nAt least that's what I thought when I answered his confession.
Was it all a mistake?
...Even after we started dating,\nnothing had really changed.
Yes, and?
We were both high school students\nand didn't have much time or the space\nto pursue our romantic relationship.
But%p-2;――
Our interactions and distance remained unchanged.\nI had no complaints about it.
That's why I thought our relationship was fine\nthe way it was.
So, it's in past tense, meaning it's different now?
...You and Nino\nmentioned something like that before, right?
Don't you want to be closer?\nHow can you endure this lukewarm state?
Those exact words weighed on my mind\nand gradually became heavier.
(Yes... The 'love' that I knew\n was something different.)
(My feelings were not as passionate\n as those of Nino or Miku.)
(I didn't hold a burning desire within my heart,\n like Ichika%p-2;――%p;)
(Nor did I have deep feelings hidden for so long,\n like Yotsuba.)
...I became unsure. Of my own feelings.
You did say that, didn't you?\nThat, if you're lovers, you should be closer.
But, we never doubted your feelings%p-2;――
It's okay, I understood that.\nYour words were just the trigger.
Even without being told,\nwe would have ended up like this someday.\nIt's me who doubts my own feelings.
Hey, Itsuki-chan. Were you perhaps trying to\nconfirm your own feelings on this trip?
...Yes.\nIt's embarrassing to admit.
I thought that if I acted like Uesugi-kun's\ngirlfriend, I might understand what my 'love'\nreally is%p-2;――
And, I thought maybe I could understand\nmy true feelings.
So that's what's been going on.\nAnd you've been feeling that way all along, huh?
I guess you could tell, huh?
It was pretty obvious.
Ahaha...
Hmm... Is this, perhaps%p-2;――
Because Itsuki-chan was actively reaching out,\nFutaro-kun got too excited, right?
That's possible.\nMaybe he felt like he had to respond as a boyfriend.
Ah...\nYeah, I can imagine that.
But, I rejected him...
I'm sure Uesugi-kun is disgusted with me now.\nEven if he hates me, I can't complain.
To do something like that...\nI really... I... I'm...
*sigh*
You really are fed up with me, aren't you...
That's not what she means.
Huh?
Listen, Itsuki.\nYou're so sad right now because you don't want\nUesugi-san to hate you, right?
That's obvious!\nBecause, I%p-2;――
Ah.
You see?\nIf someone you don't like tries to kiss you,\nyou'd normally be angry about it.
So, did you get angry and hit him because of that,\nItsuki-chan?
Right!
I've just about had it up to here with you\nplaying the lone tragic heroine.
I-I didn't mean to...
If that's the case,\nyou don't have time to think about the tedious things.\nYou know that too, don't you?
I think you're maybe too caught up\nin the aspect of love, Itsuki-chan.
The aspect...
So that's why she made an outlandish mistake\neven though it had nothing to do with her feelings.
The feeling of liking someone\nis not something that has a correct form\nor should be a certain way.
...That's right.
(Maybe by trying to confirm my own feelings,\n I was actually making them less clear...)
Thank you, everyone.\nI%p-2;――
I'm gonna face my feelings, one more time.
Okay.
